race.description: The Valley @ Southside Pakenham Maiden Plate
race.comment: CASTELLI IN ARIA (8) resumes for her second campaign. Three runs last time in were all rock solid, close up behind a good horse at her second start. She can be an improver this time around and sets up well from the ideal gate. OPEN FIRE (10) is a filly by Smart Missile on debut for the Price & Kent Jnr yard. She's won a pair of jumpouts leading in and has to be respected from the inside gate. BLUE LIGHT DISCO (1) debuted in a good maiden here and wasn't beaten far. He can improve off that and take beating. DAMA ROYALE (9) has placed in all three runs to date and is knocking on the door. She maps well and has race fitness on her side. DELIBERATE PLOY (3) is a gelding by Omaha Beach on debut who can run well first time of asking.
